title: senecio diphyllus
intro: Senecio diphyllus, also known as the Two-Leafed Senecio, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as having antimicrobial properties to combat infections. In herbal preparations, Senecio diphyllus is often made into a tea or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although its use should be cautioned due to potential toxicity.
